metadata.description: Prompt engineering plugins by Anand Vallamsetla

plugins.name: co-dialectic
plugins.description: Co-Dialectic v3 — LLM prompt optimizer + cross-family cascade-then-jury review (judge-panel) + hallucination detector. Socratic coaching, persona detection, context management, prompt improvement, and Defense-in-Depth verification across any AI.

plugins.name: career-os
plugins.description: AI-powered career management system. The operating system for your career — persistent memory, session capture, git-versioned data, full privacy. v0.24.0 file-only substrate + biographical-claim precheck.
